title: Keyboard shortcuts | SonarQube Server Documentation
content:
# Keyboard shortcuts ## [Global](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/#global "Global")
ShortcutAction
sopen search bar
?open help
## [Code page](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/#code-page "Code page")
ShortcutAction
↑↓select files
→open file
←return back to the list
## [Issues page](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/#issues-page "Issues page")
ShortcutAction
↑↓navigate between issues
→go from the list of issues to the source code
←return back to the list
alt + ↑↓to navigate issue locations
alt + ←→to switch flows
fdo an issue transition
aassign issue
massign issue to the current user
ichange severity of issue
ccomment issue
ctrl + entersubmit comment
tchange tags of issue
## [Measures page](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/#measures-page "Measures page")
ShortcutAction
↑↓select files
→open file
←return back to the list
## [Rules page](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-server/latest/user-guide/keyboard-shortcuts/#rules-page "Rules page")
ShortcutAction
↑↓navigate between rules
→go from the list of rules to the rule details
←return back to the list
